title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop app extending Claude from a chatbot into a productivity system with local file access, persistent memory, tools, connectors, skills, projects, and scheduled tasks. The video covers seven core capabilities with practical examples for automating workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
